title: Wireless charger with foreign object detection
abstract: A wireless charging transmitter that detects metallic foreign objects on the charging surface and halts power delivery to prevent overheating.
claims: A wireless charging apparatus comprising: a transmitter coil; a controller configured to drive the transmitter coil; and a foreign object detection unit configured to detect a metallic object and to halt charging when the metallic object is detected.
The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the foreign object detection unit measures a quality factor of the transmitter coil.
The apparatus of claim 1, wherein the controller resumes charging after the metallic object is removed.
source: DEMO FIXTURE (synthetic, not a real patent)
notes: Synthetic demo sample for the triage UI; not a real USPTO record.
